name: PrairieView Golf Club
address: 6734 N German Church Rd, Byron, IL 61010
about: PrairieView Golf Club is a championship golf facility located in Byron, Illinois, featuring an 18-hole course and an advanced Toptracer-equipped range, PrairieFire Golf + Grill. The course, maintained by the Byron Forest Preserve District, is noted for its generous fairways, large bent grass greens, and minimal environmental disruption. It hosts various local tournaments and offers a full-service practice center and professional instruction. PrairieFire provides year-round golf with its eight-bay indoor-outdoor temperature-controlled facility using Toptracer technology, complemented by on-site dining options including PrairieGrass Pub and a pro shop.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Toptracer technology for realistic practice and game simulation
Full-service facility with on-course dining and professional instruction
Year-round access to a temperature-controlled, high-tech driving range
Championship-quality course that's both challenging and accessible

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen at PrairieGrass Pub with a sports-themed atmosphere and wrap-around deck
Bar service available at PrairieGrass Pub

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but PrairieView also offers club rentals and a professional fitting center with Titleist and Mizuno equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, all food and beverages must be purchased from PrairieView, including at PrairieGrass Pub and PrairieFire Golf + Grill.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies, but the course is designed to accommodate both quick rounds and competitive play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, PrairieView offers junior developmental lessons for ages 5-17 and has a family-friendly atmosphere with various amenities.
